channel.title: Golang on My cool new Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on My cool new Blog

item.title: Creating a Barebones Golang Project with Vendoring Via a Custom Setup Script
item.description: Often times one may want to create a barebones Go project with dependency vendoring. I recently created a simple script which allows one to quickly scaffold a Go project that uses the vendoring tool govendor. Prerequisites In order to use the script you must have already installed Go, if you’re on Mac and have Homebrew. You can easily install Go via brew install go. For install directions for other platforms check out the official Go docs.
